/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/bseal_io_gtests.dir/io/TestAsyncReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_io_gtests.dir/io/TestAsyncWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_io_gtests.dir/io/TestBufferPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_io_gtests.dir/io/TestShardFrameHash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_io_gtests.dir/io/TestShardReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_io_gtests.dir/io/TestShardWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_io_gtests.dir/io/TestShardWriterDurability.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_io_gtests.dir/io/TestTornWrite.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_io_gtests.dir/io/TestFormatV1Kat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bseal_io_gtests.dir/io/TestMalformedShards.cpp.o -o bseal_io_gtests  -Wl,-rpath,/home/igellai/miniconda3/lib ../libbseal_core.a ../libblake3_static.a /home/igellai/miniconda3/lib/libgtest_main.so.1.11.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsodium.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so ../libargon2_static.a /home/igellai/miniconda3/lib/libgtest.so.1.11.0
